title: Define brief scope
instruction: Restate the research question, audience, desired decision, deadline, market, geography, timeframe, competitors, and excluded areas.

title: Gather and score sources
instruction: Gather source candidates using available files, approved web research, or MOCK_RESEARCH_API, then score each source for recency, authority, relevance, and bias.

title: Synthesize findings
instruction: Extract strongest evidence bullets with source notes, identify competitor moves, customer implications, operational risks, open uncertainties, group findings into themes, and remove duplicates or unsupported claims.

title: Write recommendations brief
instruction: Write the final brief with title, executive summary that states the decision implication first, key findings, 3-5 practical recommendations with confidence levels, risks, sources, follow-up questions, missing data, and suggested next research actions.
